description_long: This is a sporty coupe car with a streamlined, aerodynamic body painted in a teal blue color. The car features distinctive branding, including a large Internet Explorer logo on the roof and Windows logo graphics on the doors, giving it a unique, tech-themed appearance. The front grille is wide and horizontal, with the Audi emblem prominently displayed, and the headlights are sleek and angular. The car has two doors, dark-tinted windows, and low-profile tires mounted on dark alloy wheels. The rear of the car is compact, with red taillights and dual exhausts, and the overall silhouette is low and aggressive, typical of high-performance coupes. The surface finish is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the car's curves.
description: A teal blue, tech-themed Audi coupe car with Internet Explorer and Windows logos, featuring a sleek, sporty design and glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, Audi emblem, angular headlights, and a large Internet Explorer logo on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe profile, Windows logo on the door, dark alloy wheels, and smooth roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact back, red taillights, Audi badge, dual exhausts, and the Internet Explorer logo on the roof.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the Windows logo on the door, two-door coupe shape, and dark wheels.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
